things.name: Sossusvlei Red Sand Dunes
things.description: World's highest sand dunes in the Namib Desert with Dead Vlei salt pan and dead trees

things.name: Etosha National Park Safari
things.description: Floodlit waterholes attract lions, elephants and rhinos at night

things.name: Fish River Canyon
things.description: World's second largest canyon after the Grand Canyon - 160km long and 550m deep

things.name: Christuskirche (Christ Church)
things.description: 1907 German Lutheran church - Windhoek's most iconic building

things.name: National Museum of Namibia
things.description: Namibian natural history and the Alte Feste (Old Fort) colonial history

things.name: Katutura Township Tour
things.description: Tour of the apartheid-era township with its vibrant street food and cuca shops

things.name: Namibian Craft Centre
things.description: Namibia's finest crafts - San bushman jewelry, weaving, Himba dolls

things.name: Swakopmund & Skeleton Coast
things.description: German colonial seaside town with quad biking on desert dunes meeting the cold Atlantic

things.name: Namibia Cheetah Conservation Fund
things.description: World's leading cheetah research facility with up-close encounters

things.name: Oryx Steak & Kapana Street Grills
things.description: Namibian oryx or kudu steak and kapana grilled meat at Katutura market
